calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-07-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that no arrangements were made for a courtcall appearance and no message was received by the Court Clerk. The Petition for Letters of Administration is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Continued To Nov-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Catherwood appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that it had been suggested that the Parties would proceed by way of 13100 declarations. Mr. Catherwood stated that he did that, but the DMV in North Carolina will not accept a small estate affidavit with regard to the car and that he will be proceeding with a formal probate. The Court informed Mr. Catherwood that he needs to comply with all of the requirements as indicated in the Probate Examiner's notes, that he needs to address the notes, that he needs to have a bond in the amount of $10,000.00 and strongly recommends that he hire an Attorney. The Court also explained Ms. Verzosa's roll and informed Mr. Catherwood that she can not be his Attorney. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to November 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Catherwood to get everything done.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
